mapper.select: SELECT S.STUDENT_ID AS STUDENT_ID , S.STUDENT_NAME AS STUDENT_NAME , S.BIRTH_DATE AS BIRTH_DATE , E.EDU_NAME AS EDU_NAME , IFNULL(D.DORMITORY_ID, "X") AS DORMITORY_ID FROM STUDENTS S LEFT JOIN DORMITORIES D ON S.DORMITORY_ID = D.DORMITORY_ID LEFT JOIN EDU_INFO E ON S.EDU_ID = E.EDU_ID WHERE S.BIRTH_DATE = #{birthDate}
